title: MiniGPT bounded objective loss signal bridge target-only memory stagnation-aware suffix patch

repair_plan_actions.purpose: Add examples where loss immediately follows the fixed-l and fixed-lo fragments under the exact contract labels.
repair_plan_actions.implementation_hint: Generate paired snippets for `fixed l -> fixed loss`, `fixed lo -> fixed loss`, and direct `fixed loss` completions.

repair_plan_actions.purpose: Preserve both space-prefixed and newline-prefixed continuations so formatting drift does not hide suffix progress.
repair_plan_actions.implementation_hint: Create parallel answer/completion examples for ` answer: fixed loss` and `answer:\nfixed loss` surfaces.

repair_plan_actions.purpose: Bind patch examples to the unchanged v836 prompts instead of relying on free-form sample prompts.
repair_plan_actions.implementation_hint: Use the canonical/minimal/completion contract prompts as literal prefixes in the next patch corpus.

repair_plan_actions.purpose: Raise suffix-uptake examples above surface carry-forward examples because the prior patch changed formatting without adding loss hits.
repair_plan_actions.implementation_hint: Target at least 2:1 suffix-uptake to surface-carry-forward examples, while keeping decoder anchors at zero.

repair_plan_actions.purpose: Keep training claims gated behind unchanged contract replay, since v885 sample success did not transfer.
repair_plan_actions.implementation_hint: Require a replay comparison before any promotion or holdout route; do not infer recovery from sample text.

check_rows.detail: repair plan actions must be present
all contract surfaces must be represented
suffix examples should dominate surface examples
space and newline surface pairs must be present
patch must carry the replay verification gate

interpretation.reason: The patch materializes the no-contract-gain repair plan into exact contract prompts, suffix-position bridges, format pairs, and a replay gate.
